name: French Crêpes
instructions: 1. Sift flour, sugar, and salt into a bowl; set aside. 2. Beat the eggs and milk together in a large bowl with an electric mixer. 3. Beat in flour mixture until smooth; stir in melted butter. 4. Lightly grease a griddle or frying pan; heat over medium-high heat. 5. Pour approximately of batter onto the griddle and immediately rotate the skillet to spread it out in a thin layer. 6. Cook until the top is no longer wet and the bottom is light brown, about 1 to 2 minutes. 7. Shake the pan or use a spatula to loosen the crêpe, then flip and cook the other side for about 1 minute more. 8. Repeat with remaining batter and serve with your choice of fillings or toppings.
simpleInstructions: 1. Sift dry ingredients. 2. Mix the eggs and milk, then combine with dry ingredients and butter. 3. Heat pan, pour batter, and spread thinly. 4. Cook and flip each crêpe until golden. 5. Serve with toppings.
